definition:
1. to mix  flour or meal so as to make  it into dough, to knead , (Herdotus Historicus); γῆν φυράσειν φόνῳ to make  earth into a  bloody paste , (Aeschulus Tragicus):—;Pass., οἴνῳ καὶ ἐλαίῳ πεφυραμένα ἄλφιτα (Thucydides) 
2. metaphorically, μαλακὴν φωνὴν φυράσασθαι to make up  a soft voice, (Aristophanes Comicus) (ML)
